title: Google launches Nano Banana 2 model with faster image generation
description: Google is making Nano Banana 2 a default model in Gemini app and in AI mode

title: Jest, a marketplace for messaging games, is challenging the app store status quo
description: Jest, a marketplace for messaging games, emerged from stealth with $7 million in seed funding.

title: Figma partners with OpenAI to bake in support for Codex
description: Figma is integrating OpenAI's coding assistant Codex a week after it announced a similar integration with Anthropic's Claude Code.

title: Trace raises $3M to solve the AI agent adoption problem in enterprise
description: Trace is launching with $3 million in seed funding, including investment from Y Combinator, Zeno Ventures, Transpose Platform Management, Goodwater Capital, Formosa Capital, and WeFunder.

title: Instagram now alerts parents if their teen searches for suicide or self-harm content
description: Parents will be informed if their teen searches for suicide or self-harm content and offered resources.

title: Salesforce CEO Marc Benioff: This isn’t our first SaaSpocalypse
description: Salesforce reported a solid year-end earnings and then pulled out all the stops to ward off more talk of the death of its business to AI.

title: Gushwork bets on AI search for customer leads — and early results are emerging
description: Gushwork has raised $9 million in a seed round led by SIG and Lightspeed. The startup has seen early customer traction from AI search tools like ChatGPT.

title: Anthropic acquires computer-use AI startup Vercept after Meta poached one of its founders
description: Seattle-based Vercept developed complex agentic tools, including a computer-use agent that could complete tasks inside applications like a person with a laptop would.

title: Nvidia has another record quarter amid record capex spends
description: "The demand for tokens in the world has gone completely exponential," Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang said about the company's earnings.

title: The White House wants AI companies to cover rate hikes. Most have already said they would.
description: Many hyperscalers have already made public commitments to cover electricity cost increases.

title: Democrats to introduce bill aimed at resurrecting IRS Direct File
Google’s Nano Banana 2 brings advanced AI image tools to free users
Google might reshuffle search results to try to dodge fines in the EU
We asked experts how to build a resume for the AI hiring era
Anthropic gives its retired Claude AI a Substack
Burger King will use AI to check if employees say ‘please’ and ‘thank you’
